title: Explosive Stick
description: A stick inspired by the stick used in the @SpreenDMC events, which, upon hitting an entity, generates TNT on top of the entity and creates an explosion.
body:
🧨 Explosive Stick
Bring the chaos of explosions to the palm of your hand! Explosive Stick is a simple yet powerful mod that adds a unique weapon to your Minecraft arsenal. Forget common arrows or swords; now, a single touch can be devastating.

✨ Key Features
Explosive Stick: A new item designed with the classic Minecraft aesthetic.

Impact Mechanics: Upon hitting any entity (mobs, animals, or even other players), the stick instantly generates a primed TNT block at their position.

Visual Effects: The mod includes a custom explosion animation thanks to the Explosive Enhancement mod. This makes every hit feel massive and satisfying, moving away from the game's basic visual effects.


Required mod: Explosive Enhancement mod
